# Leo Dispatch Inc

> Leo Dispatch Inc is a U.S. truck dispatching and owner-operator recruitment company. We find high-paying freight loads and handle the back-office (rate negotiation, broker setup, paperwork, factoring) so owner-operators and small fleets can keep driving. Dedicated dispatcher per carrier, no forced dispatch, 24/7 support across all 48 states.

## About

- Company: Leo Dispatch Inc
- What we do: Truck dispatch service for owner-operators, small fleets, and new MC authorities.
- Equipment dispatched: Hotshot, Box Truck, Dry Van, Reefer, Flatbed, Power Only, Step Deck.
- Coverage: All 48 contiguous United States.
- Phone: (360) 524-3663
- Email: leodispatchinc@gmail.com
- Hours: 24/7 dispatch support, 7 days a week.

## How it works

1. Carrier uploads documents (MC authority, insurance/COI, W-9) — onboarding takes minutes.
2. Carrier is paired with one dedicated dispatcher who learns their lanes.
3. Dispatcher books high-rate-per-mile loads and negotiates with brokers.
4. Carrier drives; Leo Dispatch handles paperwork, check-ins, and factoring.

## Services

- [Dispatch Services](https://leodispatchinc.com/services): Load booking, rate negotiation, broker setup, carrier packets, POD/invoice management, factoring setup, route planning, safety compliance.
- [Equipment We Dispatch](https://leodispatchinc.com/equipment): Equipment types and example rate-per-mile ranges.
- [Carriers & MC Authority Programs](https://leodispatchinc.com/carriers): Lease onto an established MC authority and start booking loads.
- [Carrier Onboarding](https://leodispatchinc.com/onboarding): Choose an authority and complete onboarding online.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://leodispatchinc.com/)
- [About](https://leodispatchinc.com/about)
- [Contact](https://leodispatchinc.com/contact)
- [Blog](https://leodispatchinc.com/blog): Guides on dispatch, MC authority, and running a profitable trucking business.

## Why owner-operators choose Leo Dispatch

- High-paying loads (focus on rate-per-mile, not volume).
- One dedicated dispatcher — no call-center roulette.
- No forced dispatch — the driver always approves the load.
- Rate negotiation, broker communication, and full paperwork management.
- Factoring assistance for fast payment.
- 24/7 support.
